description: Parameter file documenting the regulatory assumptions used by the French Labour Cost Lab.

smic.source: Arrêté du 22 mai 2026 relatif au relèvement du salaire minimum de croissance, applicable au 1er juin 2026

rgdu_2026.comment: The reduction générale dégressive unique thresholds remain indexed to the pre-June 2026 SMIC despite the June 2026 increase in the statutory minimum wage.

notes: This file documents the regulatory assumptions associated with the simulations.
All calculations continue to be produced by the Mon-entreprise / URSSAF API.
The June 2026 version incorporates the SMIC increase and the freeze of employer contribution relief thresholds.
